Claude

Sanitized long-response shell

Recent

Long response fixture

Long response fixture

Sanitized dense conversation for scroll and marker coverage.

Long form
Read only
UYou
Lay out the fixture architecture in a way that scales to UX regression testing.
CClaude

Fixture architecture

The fixture layer should emulate the Claude DOM contracts your extension depends on while staying deterministic and reviewable.

Recommended layers

  1. Tiny selector contract tests.
  2. Fixture-backed Playwright pages on claude.ai routes.
  3. A live canary outside PR gating.
{"id":"chat-long-response","route":"/chat/fixture-long-response","pageType":"conversation","sourceMode":"sanitized_html"}
The goal is not to clone Claude. The goal is to keep your extension honest.

This longer answer also creates dense scroll behavior for floating controls, marker panels and screenshot stability.

UYou
What should we do about narrow desktop widths?
CClaude

Keep a 1180px smoke check in the matrix so floating UI collisions show up before release.

UYou
Should the refresh pipeline also validate metadata consistency?
CClaude

Yes. Route uniqueness, source mode, mutability and sanitized source presence should be checked during fixture refresh.

UYou
And the live canary?
CClaude

Keep Claude Web Guardian as a manual or nightly signal source. It should not block PRs.

Artifacts on
Dense content
